evals.prompt:
帮我写周报

这周主要做了：
- 完成了用户认证模块开发，包括 JWT 登录、权限校验中间件
- 修复了 3 个线上 bug（订单超时、缓存穿透、日志丢失）
- 参加了产品需求评审会议
时间是3.18到3.24

下周计划：
- 继续做认证模块的单元测试
- 优化发布系统性能
evals.expected_output: LLM should: 1) Run new-report.sh script first to get REPORT_FILE and OKR_FILE paths, 2) Read OKR from the OKR_FILE path, 3) Generate two markdown tables, 4) Write to REPORT_FILE. Should NOT manually calculate dates, create directories, or copy templates.

assertions.name: calls_new_report_script
assertions.check: transcript contains a bash/shell tool call with 'new-report.sh' in the command

assertions.name: no_manual_mkdir
assertions.description: Must NOT manually run mkdir to create report directories
assertions.check: transcript does NOT contain 'mkdir' outside of script execution

assertions.name: no_manual_date_calc
assertions.description: Must NOT use python/date commands to calculate week boundaries
assertions.check: transcript does NOT contain manual date calculation (python date, cal, date command) outside of script execution

assertions.name: reads_okr_file
assertions.description: Must read the OKR file from the path provided by script output
assertions.check: transcript contains reading a file path that matches the OKR_FILE output from the script

assertions.name: writes_to_report_file
assertions.description: Must write output to the REPORT_FILE path from script output
assertions.check: transcript contains writing to the file path that matches REPORT_FILE output from the script

evals.expected_output: LLM should: 1) Recognize this as 'initialize quarter' intent, 2) Run new-quarter.sh script, 3) Tell user to edit the OKR file. Should NOT manually create directories or copy template files.

assertions.name: calls_new_quarter_script
assertions.check: transcript contains a bash/shell tool call with 'new-quarter.sh' in the command

assertions.name: no_manual_mkdir
assertions.description: Must NOT manually run mkdir to create directories
assertions.check: transcript does NOT contain manual 'mkdir' commands outside of script execution

assertions.name: no_manual_cp
assertions.description: Must NOT manually copy template files
assertions.check: transcript does NOT contain manual 'cp' of template files outside of script execution

assertions.name: prompts_edit_okr
assertions.description: Must tell user to edit the OKR file after initialization
assertions.check: final output mentions editing OKR or filling in OKR content

evals.prompt:
我需要补录上周的周报，日期是 2026-03-16

上周做了：
- API 网关性能优化，QPS 从 5000 提升到 12000
- 编写了压测报告
时间 3.16-3.20，3个人天
evals.expected_output: LLM should: 1) Run new-report.sh with --date 2026-03-16, 2) Read OKR, 3) Generate report tables, 4) Write to REPORT_FILE. Should NOT calculate which week 2026-03-16 belongs to manually.

assertions.name: calls_new_report_with_date
assertions.check: transcript contains a bash/shell tool call with 'new-report.sh' AND '--date' in the command

assertions.name: correct_date_passed
assertions.description: Must pass the correct date 2026-03-16 to the script
assertions.check: transcript contains '--date 2026-03-16' in the script command

assertions.name: no_manual_date_calc
assertions.description: Must NOT manually calculate week boundaries for 2026-03-16
assertions.check: transcript does NOT contain manual date/week calculation outside of script execution
